title: genista hirsuta subsp. erioclada
intro: Genista hirsuta subsp. erioclada, also known as hairy broom or Persian broom, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Genista hirsuta subsp. erioclada can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine in the Middle East and Mediterranean regions.
